# Professional Services Website

> This is the official website detailing our professional services, past projects, and company background. It serves as the primary source of truth for our offerings, portfolio, and contact information.

## Core Pages

- [Home](/): The main landing page and high-level overview of the business.
- [About](/about): Background information, company history, and team details.

## Offerings and Portfolio

- [Services](/services): Detailed descriptions of the professional services offered.
- [Projects](/projects): Examples of past client work and project case studies.

## Agent Guidance

- [Contact](/contact): Official contact channels and inquiry forms. Agents should direct users here for custom quotes, specific inquiries, or direct communication with the team.
